Dollar weakening.threshold: DXY declining for 3+ months AND below its 12-month moving average

EM outperforming DM on relative basis.threshold: EEM outperforming SPY for 3+ consecutive months

Commodity prices rising.threshold: DBC or equivalent broad commodity index rising for 3+ months

FXI/KWEB leading.threshold: FXI or KWEB up 15%+ from 3-month low

EM rolling 3-year underperformance.threshold: EEM underperformed SPY by 30%+ on a cumulative rolling 3-year basis

Dollar strong or sideways.threshold: DXY above 100 OR flat-to-rising over the prior 12 months

No EM-positive catalysts firing yet.threshold: RMB NOT strengthening, China PMI NOT accelerating, commodities NOT in uptrend, no major EM reform catalyst

skipped_indicators: China credit impulse positive and accelerating (web-search required)
RMB strengthening (web-search required)
EM vs. DM PE gap at extremes (web-search required)
China credit impulse flat or negative (web-search required)
Geopolitical risk not escalating (web-search required)

Rates at or near effective lower bound w.threshold: Fed funds was at 0-0.25% within the last 10 years AND the current rate exceeds the level the economy can sustain without fiscal support

Negative real rates during expansion.threshold: Real fed funds rate (nominal minus CPI) negative for 3+ of the last 10 years, including during economic expansion

skipped_indicators: Total debt / GDP above historical warning level (web-search required)
Fiscal deficit as primary growth driver (web-search required)
Wealth inequality at cycle-characteristic extremes (web-search required)
Each successive crisis requires larger intervention (web-search required)

Unemployment rising.threshold: Rising 0.5%+ from cycle trough (Sahm Rule equivalent)

Credit spreads widening sharply.threshold: Above 500bp AND widening for 2+ months, OR any move above 600bp

Yield curve re-steepening from deep inve.threshold: Curve was inverted by 50bp+ AND has re-steepened by 75bp+ from the maximum inversion

Initial claims rising.threshold: 4-week average above 280K AND rising for 8+ weeks

Fed funds above nominal GDP growth.threshold: Fed funds exceeds nominal GDP growth by 1%+ for 6+ months

Credit spreads tight or tightening.threshold: Below 450bp AND not widening for 3+ consecutive months

Yield curve not deeply inverted.threshold: Above -0.50% (i.e., inversion shallower than 50bp, or positively sloped)

Fed funds below nominal GDP growth.threshold: Fed funds rate below nominal GDP growth rate

skipped_indicators: SLOOS showing broad tightening (web-search required)
Net credit growth positive (web-search required)
Consumer/business confidence (web-search required)
Interest expense / tax receipts ratio (web-search required)
Interest expense exceeds major discretionary category (web-search required)
Deficit pace outside recession (web-search required)
No credible deficit reduction plan (web-search required)
Debt rollover at higher rates (web-search required)
Central bank gold purchases sustained (web-search required)

Rate hikes not producing recession.threshold: Unemployment below 5% AND ISM proxy above 45 after 12+ months of Fed funds above 4%

Hard assets outperforming nominal bonds.threshold: Above +10% (i.e., average hard asset 12M return exceeds average nominal bond 12M return by 10%+)

Fed balance sheet direction inconsistent.threshold: Fed BS declining slower than announced QT pace, OR flat, OR expanding despite no announced policy change

TGA behavior consistent with spending.threshold: TGA below $500B OR declining by $100B+ over 60 days

skipped_indicators: Deficit pace (web-search required)

Gold/oil ratio elevated and rising.threshold: Above 25 (vs. historical average ~16-20) AND rising on trailing 12-month basis

skipped_indicators: Central bank gold purchases sustained at elevated levels (web-search required)
Foreign official Treasury holdings declining as share of outstanding (web-search required)
Cross-currency basis swap stress episodic (web-search required)
Non-dollar trade settlement growing (web-search required)
Sanctions weaponization continuing or expanding (web-search required)
Pozsar/Gromen thesis gaining institutional adoption (web-search required)
CAPE level (web-search required)
Capex/revenue mismatch (web-search required)
Margin debt (web-search required)
Passive fund share (web-search required)

Market breadth narrow.threshold: QQQ/IWM ratio above 2-year high AND RSP underperforming SPY by 5%+ over 12 months

skipped_indicators: Shiller CAPE elevated (web-search required)
Buffett Indicator extreme (web-search required)
Corporate profit margins at cycle highs (web-search required)
Insider selling elevated (web-search required)
